title: Shalz tank vs safehouse!
description: The modpack from shalz's video "Create Mod Tank vs Safehouse!"
body: This is the EXACT modpack, down to the version, of shalz's  video "[Create Mod Tank vs Safehouse!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDtnT_6KptE)", DO NOT update the mods!! Updating the mods can crash, or corrupt the modpack, Have fun blowing things up with tanks >:)
